tasks.compile:windows: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release/windows', { recursive: true });" && deno desktop --no-npm --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output ./release/windows/runner.exe --icon ./desktop/assets/app-icon.ico --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --allow-net=127.0.0.1,localhost --include ./.tmp/payload-manifest.json --include ./desktop/assets ./desktop/main.ts
tasks.compile:win: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release/windows', { recursive: true });" && deno desktop --backend cef --no-npm --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output ./release/windows/runner.exe --icon ./desktop/assets/app-icon.ico --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --allow-net=127.0.0.1,localhost --include ./.tmp/payload-manifest.json --include ./desktop/assets ./desktop/main.ts
tasks.compile:mac:arm: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release/mac', { recursive: true });" && deno desktop --no-npm --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output /tmp/runner.app --icon ./desktop/assets/app-icon.icns --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --allow-net=127.0.0.1,localhost --include ./.tmp/payload-manifest.json --include ./desktop/assets ./desktop/main.ts
tasks.package:windows: npm run build && node scripts/build-windows-icon.js && node scripts/prepare-release-dir.js windows && node scripts/ensure-vendored-node-runtime.js windows && node scripts/ensure-vendored-deno-runtime.js windows && node scripts/prepare-runtime-node-modules.js && node scripts/create-deno-payload.js windows && node scripts/run-deno-task.js compile:windows windows && node scripts/finalize-release-dir.js
tasks.package:win: npm run build && node scripts/build-windows-icon.js && node scripts/prepare-release-dir.js windows && node scripts/ensure-vendored-node-runtime.js windows && node scripts/ensure-vendored-deno-runtime.js windows && node scripts/prepare-runtime-node-modules.js && node scripts/create-deno-payload.js windows && node scripts/run-deno-task.js compile:win windows && node scripts/finalize-release-dir.js
tasks.package:mac:arm: npm run build && node scripts/build-macos-icon.js && node scripts/prepare-release-dir.js mac-arm64 && node scripts/ensure-vendored-node-runtime.js mac-arm64 && node scripts/ensure-vendored-deno-runtime.js mac-arm64 && node scripts/prepare-runtime-node-modules.js && node scripts/create-deno-payload.js mac-arm64 && node scripts/run-deno-task.js compile:mac:arm mac-arm64 && node scripts/finalize-macos-desktop-app.js && node scripts/finalize-release-dir.js
